reason: Verified that the browser-use feature works correctly - agent can open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve page title, and report results to user.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded Gamut app home page with agent list in sidebar
Step 2: Clicked on "QA-20260721-184046-6vsv" agent in sidebar — Successfully opened agent chat interface with message input field
Step 3: Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message successfully submitted, agent status changed to "working"
Step 4: Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent completed work in ~2 seconds and returned successful response
Step 5: Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and took screenshot — Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." - Requirement verified
